content:
- Picked up task 39 (file sink support for unified structured logging) which already had a draft plan; performed deep skeptical review with subagents and revised plan (fanout semantics, bootstrap error layering, added early compile gate, removed flush_every_record in favor of LineWriter).
- Implemented logging.sinks config surface (schema/defaults/parser) including Partial* merge support, validation, and tests.
- Implemented JsonlFileSink + FanoutSink + LogBootstrapError in src/logging/mod.rs; bootstrap now wires stderr+file sinks and fails fast on file sink init errors.
- Updated all RuntimeConfig/LoggingConfig struct literals across src/, examples/, and integration tests to include sinks.
- Added unit tests for JsonlFileSink (create/append/truncate/deterministic failure) and FanoutSink semantics.
- Adjusted Makefile ULTRA_LONG_TESTS to keep make test under 120s; verified make check, make test, make test-long, make lint all pass.
- Hit a CI-like failure due to root filesystem full ("No space left on device"), cleaned large /tmp/pgtuskmaster-* artifacts to restore space and reran gates successfully.
- Updated AGENTS.md with new learning about /tmp disk pressure from test artifacts.
- Marked task 39 as done/passing, ran .ralph/task_switch.sh, and prepared for commit+push.

- Next: git commit + git push for task 39 completion.
